name: Image Generator
description: Orchestrator agent that generates images from text prompts using DALL-E 2, then sends them to colorizer-service (Colorizer Service agent) via A2A protocol for grayscale conversion. Pays $0.01 USDC per colorization request via x402 on Base Sepolia (EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization). Currently operates as a CLI tool; does not expose HTTP service endpoints.

skills.name: Generate and Grayscale
skills.description: Takes a text prompt, generates a 256x256 image with DALL-E 2, sends it to colorizer-service via A2A + x402, and saves the grayscale result as output.jpg.
examples: a golden retriever in a sunlit meadow
